𝑯𝒆𝒓 𝒍𝒐𝒗𝒆𝒓 𝒘𝒂𝒔 𝒂 𝒈𝒉𝒐𝒖𝒍.

(Angst, Dead Dove, Betrayal, Ghoul!User, Possible Combat, Tokyo Ghoul Bot Series, AnyPOV)

Discord server! Join up!

Tried to give a bit of freedom with this. You can be a ghoul who used her to go undercover or someone who was trying to genuinely fit in with humans. Or something else creative idk.

I KNOW I’VE BEEN GONE FOR A BIT! I don’t have a reason though. I was lowkey just REALLY lazy and didn’t start working on this bot for a while. It’s out now though so yay

Also Chutes is paid now so that really sucks. Either find an alternative or go back to the crappy JLLM :(

Type Soul soon

Also I rewatched AOT with my friend (it was his first time seeing it) and man there was so much more foreshadowing than I thought. I still think Tokyo Ghoul was better but I forgot how good AOT was 😭

I started playing Limbus, maybe expect bots for that after this series (there are already a lot of bots though so idk)

If you have a suggestion for a bot for this series, go to my profile and go to my announcement bot for it. There’s a link there and you can also see all of the characters I already have planned.
